title: Disassembly and assembly of select levers

blocks.text: Disassembly and assembly of select levers

items: Do not wipe off the grease applied during disassembly and reassembly, since the parts indicated by the "*" are coated with a special grease.
Do not wipe off the grease applied during disassembly and reassembly, because the parts indicated by the "*" are coated with a special grease.

blocks.text: Remove the socket (B) from the shift position indicator panel (A).
Shift Position Indicator Panel Remove the light harness (A) from the harness guide (B) and remove the shift position indicator panel (C).
4. Shift lock release, release Remove spring
Unlock the shift lock release (A) and remove the shift lock release (B) and release spring (C).

items: Do not wipe off the grease applied during disassembly and reassembly, since the parts indicated by the "*" are coated with a special grease.

blocks.text: The parking pin switch and shift position indicator panel light harness are assembled into the select lever bracket base and should be replaced as a set with the select lever bracket base.
Shift lock Insert a wiring screwdriver or similar tool into the mounting lock (B) of the solenoid (A) to widen the lock.
Installation is the reverse of the removal procedure.

items: Do not wipe off the grease applied during disassembly and reassembly, because the parts indicated by the "*" are coated with a special grease.
